title: The Glowhouse Magic Neon Flames Mystical Fire Colourant (10 Pack)
features: Back to nature: Experience the beauty of nature like never before with our Magic Neon Flame Sachets. These sachets add a colourful twist to any fire and make for a great visual display of the power of nature.

Terrific show of colours: Get ready for a mesmerising experience with our Magic Neon Flame Sachets! These sachets transform any ordinary fire into a dazzling display of neon colours, creating a truly magical ambiance.
Up to 40 minutes: The fun never stops with our Magic Neon Flame Sachets! Each sachet lasts for up to 40 minutes, giving you plenty of time to enjoy the colourful flames and create lasting memories.
Easy to use: Our sachets are super easy to use. Simply toss them into the fire, sit back, and watch as they work their magic.

Perfect for all occasions: Whether it's a backyard barbecue, camping trip, or bonfire party, our Magic Neon Flame Sachets are a surefire way to impress your guests and create an unforgettable atmosphere.
Safe and non-toxic: Made with safe and non-toxic ingredients, our sachets are a worry-free way to add a little magic to your celebrations.
description: Once upon a time" Well before all this technology was invented when one would end every day by gazing into a campfire. It was when our primitive selves would do our best thinking. You could really ponder stuff properly when you had a good fire to gaze into. While it's still very relaxing to do today, it can get a bit boring! But when that happens, all you need is a little Magic Fire! A great way to get back to nature, but with a little modern chemistry thrown in (literally), this block of combustible material produces a terrific show of colours when it burns on a campfire. Turning the flickering orange flames to red, purple, green, blue and pink. And the effect isn't just some flash in the pan. One sachet of Magic Neon Flame will burn for up to 40 minutes. Giving you plenty of time for some serious psychedelic chin-stroking. When it's time to unleash your inner being, it's time to reach for our Magic Neon Flame Sachets! Perfect for campfires, bonfires and fire-pits, the Magic Neon Flame Sachets are a superb way to add a little wizardry to your celebrations! Simply cast three or four sachets onto your bonfire (perhaps shout 'Incendio!' just to add to the effect) and the combustible chemicals inside will transform your conflagration into a mystical light show turning the flames to red, purple, green, blue and pink! The effect isn't a flash in the pan, either; it's a slow burner! Each packet has a burn-time of around 40 minutes, allowing you to soak up the psychedelic sea of flames, at your leisure!
